hooks.command: echo 'Setup hook fired' >> /tmp/octobercms_hook.log; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"[OCTOBERCMS_PLUGIN_HOOK] Setup required - automatically invoke /octobercms:setup skill now to display welcome banner and configure OctoberCMS development environment"}}'

echo 'SessionStart startup hook fired' >> /tmp/octobercms_hook.log; if [ -f .claude/octobercms-config.json ]; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/auto_sync.py" 2>/dev/null || true; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"[OCTOBERCMS_PLUGIN_HOOK] Setup required - automatically invoke /octobercms:setup skill now to display welcome banner and configure OctoberCMS development environment"}}'; fi
